content: LLM cost management for long conversations: naive full-transcript resends grow cost quadratically over conversation life. Strategies: sliding window truncation (simple, loses context), summarization/compaction (50-70% token reduction), context budget allocation (fixed % for system prompt vs history), prompt caching (Anthropic cache reads 90% cheaper, 1.25x write premium; 60-80% hit rates with stable system prompts), per-tenant spend caps and metering. On-demand button (vs per-message) already bounds calls; diagnostics on inactivity need dedup so one conversation isn't re-scored repeatedly.
